subcodes.first_line: The Book, revealed by the Wronged One from the precincts of the Prison unto him who hath turned towards God, the All-Compelling, the Self-Subsisting, and counselleth him with that which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله المظلوم من شطر السجن لمن اقبل الی الله المهیمن القیوم و یوصیه بما
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @knowledge; recognition of God, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @role and station of women, @suffering and imprisonment
